traits.name: Acolyte
traits.description: Acquire a random Trait and some Hunt Dollars when you or your team picks up a Clue .

traits.name: Adrenaline
traits.description: When you enter critical health, you will receive a small Stamina boost.

traits.name: All Ears
traits.description: While using Dark Sight, decreases Dark Sight noise and increases sounds of enemy Hunters in the direction you're facing.

traits.name: Ambidextrous
traits.description: Quicker reloading of matched pairs, and custom clip reloads for semi-auto pistol sets.

traits.name: Assailant
traits.description: Increases melee effectiveness of Throwing Knives and Throwing Axes .

traits.name: Beastface
traits.description: Reduce reaction range of animals (doesn't affect Monsters like Hellhounds ).

traits.name: Berserker
traits.description: All melee attacks do double damage.

traits.name: Blade Seer
traits.description: While using Dark Sight , increases distance of highlighted Bolts , Arrows , Harpoon , Throwing Axes , and Throwing Knives to 75m. Also applies to Beetle View.

traits.name: Blademancer
traits.description: Using Dark Sight , take retrievable ammo in front of you. (100m)

traits.name: Blast Sense
traits.description: Loud sounds such as gunshots and explosions are highlighted while in Dark Sight . Gunshots from Silenced Weapons with Subsonic Ammo cannot be seen. (200m)

traits.name: Blazeborne
traits.description: Health restoration is greatly increased while in flames and you can't catch on fire .

traits.name: Bloodless
traits.description: Bleeding will not escalate from lignt to medium or intense bleeding.

traits.name: Bolt Thrower
traits.description: Reduced reload time for Crossbows , Bomb Launchers , and Bomb Lances .

traits.name: Bruiser
traits.description: Reduces melee stamina consumption and flinching when taking damage.

traits.name: Bulletgrubber
traits.description: Recover unfired round when performing partial reloads.

traits.name: Bulwark
traits.description: Reduce the damage from explosions by 50%. Vastly reduces the duration of being fully blinded by a Flash Bomb .

traits.name: Catalyst
traits.description: Unlock Conditional Trait Effects on the Beastface , Kiteskin , Vigilant , Pain Sense , and Frontiersman Traits. Conditional Effects activate when their base Trait is equipped.

traits.name: Communion
traits.description: While using Dark Sight , temporarily lower your Max HP by 15 to heal your teammate 75 HP and remove their negative status effects (25m).

traits.name: Conduit
traits.description: Get a health and stamina boost when your team picks up a Clue or closes a Rift .

traits.name: Corpse Seer
traits.description: Receive Dark Sight Boost when looting downed Hunters .

traits.name: Crack Shot
traits.description: Reduce sway for weapons and increase zoom level in iron sights for rifles and pistols with stocks. Excludes shotguns and sawed-off variants.

traits.name: Dauntless
traits.description: Thrown explosives can be defused when interacting with them.

traits.name: Deadeye Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a short scope (Deadeye variants).

traits.name: Death Cheat
traits.description: You will not lose your Hunter if you fail to extract, but equipment and missing Health Chunks will be lost.

traits.name: Decoy Supply
traits.description: Restock all types of Decoys from ammo crates.

traits.name: Determination
traits.description: Stamina recovery starts sooner.

traits.name: Dewclaw
traits.description: Enhances the melee attack of a bow and arrow.

traits.name: Doctor
traits.description: Doubles the amount of Health restored by First Aid Kit .

traits.name: Fanning
traits.description: Faster rate of fire when using one-handed or two-handed single-action pistols.

traits.name: Fast Fingers
traits.description: Prepare some bullets in hand to reload single-shot rifles, and their non-pistol variants, faster.

traits.name: Final Gasp
traits.description: Looting a Hunter triggers a Restoration effect for your Hunter. (Burn Trait)

traits.name: Fire Eater
traits.description: In exchange for 1 Pledge Mark, when a health chunk is burnt away, it is instead instantly restored.

traits.name: Flame Touched
traits.description: If you have 4 Pledge Marks, you can't catch on fire even when downed, but your health chunks still burn at a slower rate while in flames.

traits.name: Frontiersman
traits.description: Carried Tools can be used one extra time.

traits.name: Gator Legs
traits.description: Walk and sprint faster in deep water. Also make less noise while crouched in water.

traits.name: Ghoul
traits.description: Killing Monsters restores a small amount of health.

traits.name: Greyhound
traits.description: Sprint at full speed for a longer duration.

traits.name: Gunrunner
traits.description: Equip up to two Large Slot weapons on your Hunter.

traits.name: Hornskin
traits.description: Reduce damage taken from blunt damage by 25%.

traits.name: Hundred Hands
traits.description: Increases the damage of a Hunting Bow and reduces sway while at full draw. Allows use of arrows in melee attacks.

traits.name: Indomitable
traits.description: If you have 4 Pledge Marks, health regenerates continuously until fully healed.

traits.name: Instinct
traits.description: While in Dark Sight , sense when enemy Hunters are nearby. (75m)

traits.name: Iron Devastator
traits.description: Remain in iron sights between shots using pump-action shotguns.

traits.name: Iron Eye
traits.description: Remain in iron sights between shots when firing bolt-action, lever-action, and pump-action Weapons.

traits.name: Iron Repeater
traits.description: Remain in iron sights after firing a shot while using lever-action rifles.

traits.name: Iron Sharpshooter
traits.description: Remain in iron sights after firing a shot while using bolt-action rifles.

traits.name: Kiteskin
traits.description: Significantly reduces fall damage.

traits.name: Levering
traits.description: Faster rate of fire from the hip (First aim stage) when using lever-action weapons.

traits.name: Lightfoot
traits.description: Vault, fall and climb ladders silently. Also reduces the sound of walking through noise traps.

traits.name: Magpie
traits.description: Receive three short effects when picking up a Bounty Token: Antidote, Stamina and Regeneration.

traits.name: Mariner
traits.description: Health and Stamina regeneration is greatly increased while in water and marginally increased while exposed to heavy rain.

traits.name: Marksman Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a medium scope (Marksman variants).

traits.name: Martialist
traits.description: Allows a Katana to be sheathed, which enables a first strike attack that does extra damage.

traits.name: Mithridatist
traits.description: Drastically reduces the time needed to recover from poisoning .

traits.name: Necromancer
traits.description: Using Dark Sight , revive a downed teammate from a distance. (25m)

traits.name: Packmule
traits.description: Receive an additional Tool or Consumable when looting dead enemy Hunters or opening item boxes.

traits.name: Pain Sense
traits.description: You can see nearby bleeding , poisoned and burning Hunters while in Dark Sight . Also applies to Beetle view. (150m)

traits.name: Peacekeeper
traits.description: Looting a Hunter will restore one Health Chunk.

traits.name: Physician
traits.description: Reduce the time needed to bandage.

traits.name: Pitcher
traits.description: Increased throwing range for all items using the aim helper.

traits.name: Poacher
traits.description: Place and disarm traps quietly.

traits.name: Poltergeist
traits.description: Players can manipulate, interact, and agitate in-world objects and animals remotely via Dark Sight . (50m) Works in Beetle View.

traits.name: Quartermaster
traits.description: Gain +1 Weapon Capacity

traits.name: Rampage
traits.description: Killing an enemy Hunter while at least one Health Chunk is empty triggers a Restoration for your Hunter.

traits.name: Relentless
traits.description: Your Hunter won't lose a Health Chunk when downed.

traits.name: Remedy
traits.description: While using Dark Sight , interact with a Trait Spur within range to trigger a Restoration effect for your team. (25m) Also applies to Beetle view.

traits.name: Resilience
traits.description: Your Hunter is revived with up to full health.

traits.name: Salveskin
traits.description: While alive, reduce all fire damage and stop burn speed and stop time from escalating.

traits.name: Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a scope.

traits.name: Serpent
traits.description: Using Dark Sight , interact with nearby Clues , Rifts , Banishable Targets and abandoned Bounty Tokens. (25m) Applies to Beetle view, except for Bounty Token interactions.

traits.name: Shadow
traits.description: Monsters can't see you, but they can still hear you.

traits.name: Shadow Crush
traits.description: Using Dark Sight , damage any Monster or Target once. (25m)

traits.name: Shadow Leap
traits.description: Using Dark Sight , channel a Monster within range to jump to its location and kill it instantly. Excludes Targets . (50m)

traits.name: Signee
traits.description: Boost Event Points by 10%.

traits.name: Silent Killer
traits.description: Reduces the sound you make when performing melee attacks.

traits.name: Sniper Scopesmith
traits.description: Remain in scope view after firing a shot while using any weapon with a long scope (Sniper variants).

traits.name: Steady Aim
traits.description: Weapon sway gradually lessens when you're looking through a scope or Aperture sights.

traits.name: Steady Hand
traits.description: Weapon sway gradually lessens when you're looking through the scope of a pistol.

traits.name: Surefoot
traits.description: You can sprint while holding primed Throwables, First Aid Kits , and Consumable Shots.

traits.name: Tomahawk
traits.description: Melee weapons found in the world can be thrown.

traits.name: Vigilant
traits.description: Nearby traps and active Beetles are highlighted in Dark Sight . Also applies to Beetle view. (25m)

traits.name: Vigor
traits.description: While in Dark Sight , doubles the rate at which Health and Stamina regenerate.

traits.name: Vulture
traits.description: Looting a dead enemy Hunter will always reward you Hunt Dollars .

traits.name: Whispersmith
traits.description: Reduces noise when selecting equipment.

traits.name: Witness
traits.description: While in Dark Sight , dead Hunters and Monsters are visible. Also applies to Beetle view.

weapons.name: 1865 Carbine
weapons.description: Specter Arms made, repeating rifle. Well-balanced and fast reloads make this effective at medium range, but lacks Levering.

weapons.name: 1865 Carbine Aperture
weapons.description: Specter Arms made, repeating rifle. Well-balanced and fast reloads make this effective at medium range, but lacks Levering. Modified with an enhanced toggle-able sight.

weapons.name: 1865 Carbine Silencer
weapons.description: Specter Arms made, repeating rifle. Well-balanced and fast reloads make this effective at medium range, but lacks Levering. Modified with a silencer.

weapons.name: 1890 Cavalry
weapons.description: Springfield made, breech-loading trapdoor cavalry carbine. Fires single shots at medium range with high damage.

weapons.name: Auto-4 Shorty
weapons.description: Crown & King made, semi-automatic shotgun. Dominates close range with high power and fire-rate, but has a strong recoil. Shortened stock and barrel with one less round than the Auto-5 .

weapons.name: Auto-5
weapons.description: Crown & King made, semi-automatic shotgun. Dominates close range with high power and fire-rate, but has a strong recoil.

weapons.name: Baseball Bat
weapons.description: Wooden Baseball Bat that swings fast and powerfully.

weapons.name: Berthier 1892
weapons.description: French made, bolt-action carbine. High power for its light barrel. Partial reloads are punishing.

weapons.name: Berthier 1892 Deadeye
weapons.description: French made, bolt-action carbine. High power for its light barrel. Partial reloads are punishing. Modified with a mid-range scope.

weapons.name: Berthier 1892 Marksman
weapons.description: French made, bolt-action carbine. High power for its light barrel. Partial reloads are punishing. Modified with a mid-to-long-range scope.

weapons.name: Berthier 1892 Riposte
weapons.description: French made, bolt-action carbine. High power for its light barrel. Partial reloads are punishing. Modified with a long bladed saber.

weapons.name: Bomb Lance
weapons.description: Bladed harpoon launcher, adapted to fire projectiles with a delayed explosive. Lethal at short range but cumbersome to reload.

weapons.name: Bomb Launcher
weapons.description: This compact launcher fires spring-loaded projectiles over short distances. Deals tremendous damage on direct impact.

weapons.name: Bornheim No. 3
weapons.description: German made, semi-automatic pistol. High fire-rate and velocity, and low recoil. Balanced by low power and wasteful reloads. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Bornheim No. 3 Extended
weapons.description: German made, semi-automatic pistol. High fire-rate and velocity, and low recoil. Balanced by low power and wasteful reloads. Modified with an extended ammo capacity. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Bornheim No. 3 Match
weapons.description: German made, semi-automatic pistol. High fire-rate and velocity, and low recoil. Balanced by low power and wasteful reloads. Modified with enhanced sights, barrel, and stock.

weapons.name: Bornheim No. 3 Silencer
weapons.description: German made, semi-automatic pistol. High fire-rate and velocity, and low recoil. Balanced by low power and wasteful reloads. Modified with a silencer. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Cavalry Saber
weapons.description: One-handed saber in use since the Civil War. Lightweight with good reach.

weapons.name: Centennial
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High muzzle velocity and good damage at range.

weapons.name: Centennial Pointman
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High muzzle velocity and good damage at range. Shortened stock and modified with a mid-to-long-range scope.

weapons.name: Centennial Shorty
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High muzzle velocity and good damage at range. Shortened stock and barrel.

weapons.name: Centennial Shorty Silencer
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High muzzle velocity and good damage at range. Shortened and modified with a silencer.

weapons.name: Centennial Sniper
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High muzzle velocity and good damage at range. Modified with a long-range scope.

weapons.name: Centennial Trauma
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High muzzle velocity and good damage at range. Modified with a stock mounted bludgeon.

weapons.name: Chu Ko Nu
weapons.description: Repeating Crossbow that fires Compact Bolts. Has a high rate of fire and is quiet. Bolts can be recovered and reused.

weapons.name: Combat Axe
weapons.description: Two-handed axe that swings slowly but splits skulls.

weapons.name: Conversion
weapons.description: Caldwell made, single-action revolver. Slow to reload, but reliable and accurate. Converted to fire cartridges. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Conversion Chain Pistol
weapons.description: Caldwell made, single-action revolver. Slow to reload, but reliable and accurate. Converted to fire cartridges. Modified with an extended chain cylinder. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Crossbow
weapons.description: Crossbow that fires powerful bolts. Quiet at range, but cumbersome with a long reload. Bolts can be recovered and reused.

weapons.name: Crossbow Deadeye
weapons.description: Crossbow that fires powerful bolts. Quiet at range, but cumbersome with a long reload. Bolts can be recovered and reused. Modified with a mid-range scope.

weapons.name: Dolch 96
weapons.description: Ludwig Arms made, semi-automatic pistol. High power and fire-rate. When empty, can be reloaded with a stripper clip. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Dolch 96 Bullseye
weapons.description: Ludwig Arms made, semi-automatic pistol. High power and fire-rate. Incompatible with stripper clips. Modified with a Deadeye scope, but no stock. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Dolch 96 Claw
weapons.description: Ludwig Arms made, semi-automatic pistol. High power and fire-rate. When empty, can be reloaded with a stripper clip. Modified with a grip-mounted blade. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Dolch 96 Precision
weapons.description: Ludwig Arms made, semi-automatic pistol. High power and fire-rate. When empty, can be reloaded with a stripper clip. Modified with an added stock.

weapons.name: Drilling
weapons.description: German made, break-action combination firearm with two rifle barrels and single shotgun underbarrel. Highly flexible.

weapons.name: Drilling Hatchet
weapons.description: German made, break-action combination firearm with two rifle barrels and single shotgun underbarrel. Highly flexible. Shortened and modified with an axe blade.

weapons.name: Drilling Shorty
weapons.description: German made, break-action combination firearm with two rifle barrels and single shotgun underbarrel. Highly flexible. Shortened stock and barrel.

weapons.name: Flame Rifle
weapons.description: Custom-made, rifle conversion that releases pressurized liquid which ignites on ejection, producing a steady burst of flames. Requires pumping to increase pressure - higher pressure means longer reaching flames. The pressure is lost over time and while shooting. Can only resupply at Oil Barrels .

weapons.name: Frontier 73C
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. A lightened Ranger 73, this trades convenience for a slightly reduced capacity.

weapons.name: Frontier 73C Marksman
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. A lightened Ranger 73, this trades convenience for a slightly reduced capacity. Modified with a mid-to-long-range scope.

weapons.name: Frontier 73C Silencer
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. A lightened Ranger 73, this trades convenience for a slightly reduced capacity. Modified with a silencer.

weapons.name: Hand Crossbow
weapons.description: Hand Crossbow that fires compact bolts. Quiet at range and convenient to carry. Bolts can be retrieved and reused.

weapons.name: Haymaker
weapons.description: Re-envisioned, single-action combination revolver with an additional shotgun barrel. A Long Ammo conversion of the LeMat.

weapons.name: Homestead 78
weapons.description: Sturdy, break-action, side-by-side shotgun with a long barrel that can destroy all but the toughest targets.

weapons.name: Hunting Bow
weapons.description: Hunting Bow that fires arrows a great distance. Perfect for stealth. Arrows can be recovered and reused.

weapons.name: Infantry 73L
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. A lengthened Ranger 73 that is better at long range and has a larger capacity.

weapons.name: Infantry 73L Bayonet
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. A lengthened Ranger 73 that is better at long range and has a larger capacity. Modified with a bayonet for melee.

weapons.name: Infantry 73L Sniper
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. A lengthened Ranger 73 that is better at long range and has a larger capacity. Modified with a long-range scope.

weapons.name: Katana
weapons.description: Two-handed, single-edged sword. Swift and sharp enough to pierce the sturdiest armor.

weapons.name: Krag
weapons.description: Springfield made, bolt-action rifle. High fire-rate and ability to top off are offset by lower damage than other rifles.

weapons.name: Krag Bayonet
weapons.description: Springfield made, bolt-action rifle. High fire-rate and ability to top off are offset by lower damage than other rifles. Modified with a bayonet for melee.

weapons.name: Krag Silencer
weapons.description: Springfield made, bolt-action rifle. High fire-rate and ability to top off are offset by lower damage than other rifles. Modified with a silencer.

weapons.name: Krag Sniper
weapons.description: Springfield made, bolt-action rifle. High fire-rate and ability to top off are offset by lower damage than other rifles. Modified with a long-range scope.

weapons.name: Lebel 1886
weapons.description: French made, bolt-action rifle. High magazine capacity, damage, and velocity are offset with a slow and wasteful reload.

weapons.name: Lebel 1886 Aperture
weapons.description: French made, bolt-action rifle. High magazine capacity, damage, and velocity are offset with a slow and wasteful reload. Modified with an enhanced toggle-able sight.

weapons.name: Lebel 1886 Marksman
weapons.description: French made, bolt-action rifle. High magazine capacity, damage, and velocity are offset with a slow and wasteful reload. Modified with a mid-to-long-range scope.

weapons.name: Lebel 1886 Talon
weapons.description: French made, bolt-action rifle. High magazine capacity, damage, and velocity are offset with a slow and wasteful reload. Modified with a stock-mounted blade.

weapons.name: LeMat
weapons.description: Re-envisioned, single-action combination revolver with an additional shotgun barrel. High capacity and strong at close range. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: LeMat Carbine
weapons.description: Re-envisioned, single-action combination revolver with an additional shotgun barrel. High capacity and strong at close range. Extended stock and barrel.

weapons.name: LeMat Carbine Marksman
weapons.description: Re-envisioned, single-action combination revolver with an additional shotgun barrel. High capacity and strong at close range. Extended stock and barrel, modified with a Marksman scope.

weapons.name: Machete
weapons.description: One-handed machete, reliable and convenient to carry.

weapons.name: Mako 1895
weapons.description: American made, lever-action rifle. Good cycle rate and high damage make this versatile. Can be topped off.

weapons.name: Mako 1895 Aperture
weapons.description: American made, lever-action rifle. Good cycle rate and high damage make this versatile. Can be topped off. Modified with an enhanced toggle-able sight.

weapons.name: Mako 1895 Claw
weapons.description: American made, lever-action rifle. Good cycle rate and high damage make this versatile. Can be topped off. Modified with grip-mounted blade.

weapons.name: Marathon
weapons.description: Caldwell made, pump-action rifle. Good cycle rate and high capacity, but has a wasteful reload.

weapons.name: Marathon Swift
weapons.description: Caldwell made, pump-action rifle. Good cycle rate and high capacity, but has a wasteful reload.

weapons.name: Martini-Henry
weapons.description: British made, single-shot breech-loading rifle. Can be quickly reloaded and offers good power.

weapons.name: Martini-Henry Deadeye
weapons.description: British made, single-shot breech-loading rifle. Can be quickly reloaded and offers good power. Modified with a mid-range scope.

weapons.name: Martini-Henry Ironside
weapons.description: British made, single-shot breech-loading rifle. Can be quickly reloaded and offers good power. Modified with a semi-automatic conversion.

weapons.name: Martini-Henry Marksman
weapons.description: British made, single-shot breech-loading rifle. Can be quickly reloaded and offers good power. Modified with a mid-to-long-range scope.

weapons.name: Martini-Henry Riposte
weapons.description: British made, single-shot breech-loading rifle. Can be quickly reloaded and offers good power. Modified with a long bladed saber.

weapons.name: Maynard Sniper
weapons.description: A scoped rifle with high damage and medium ammo. Requires a two-stage reload with the placement of a percussion cap.

weapons.name: Maynard Sniper Silencer
weapons.description: A scoped rifle with high damage and medium ammo. Requires a two-stage reload with the placement of a percussion cap. Modified with a silencer.

weapons.name: Mosin Obrez
weapons.description: Russian made, bolt-action rifle. A shortened Mosin-Nagant, powerful albeit some reduced power and less effective range.

weapons.name: Mosin Obrez Extended
weapons.description: Russian made, bolt-action rifle. A shortened Mosin-Nagant, powerful albeit some reduced power and less effective range. Modified with an extended ammo capacity.

weapons.name: Mosin Obrez Mace
weapons.description: Russian made, bolt-action rifle. A shortened Mosin-Nagant, powerful albeit some reduced power and less effective range. Shortened and modified with a rear bludgeon.

weapons.name: Mosin Obrez Match
weapons.description: Russian made, bolt-action rifle. A shortened Mosin-Nagant, powerful albeit some reduced power and less effective range. Modified with enhanced sights, barrel, and stock.

weapons.name: Mosin Obrez Sharpeye
weapons.description: Russian made, bolt-action rifle. A shortened Mosin-Nagant, powerful albeit some reduced power and less effective range. Modified with an extended barrel, stock, and mid-range scope.

weapons.name: Mosin-Nagant
weapons.description: Russian made, bolt-action rifle. Powerful, fast, and can be reloaded with a stripper clip.

weapons.name: Mosin-Nagant Avtomat
weapons.description: Russian made, bolt-action rifle. Powerful, fast, and can be reloaded with a stripper clip. Modified with an automatic action and increased ammo capacity.

weapons.name: Mosin-Nagant Bayonet
weapons.description: Russian made, bolt-action rifle. Powerful, fast, and can be reloaded with a stripper clip. Modified with a bayonet for melee.

weapons.name: Mosin-Nagant Sniper
weapons.description: Russian made, bolt-action rifle. Powerful and fast, but incompatible with stripper clips. Modified with a long-range scope.

weapons.name: Nagant M1895
weapons.description: Nagant made, single-action revolver. Medium damage, with a decent muzzle velocity and capacity. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Nagant M1895 Deadeye
weapons.description: Nagant made, single-action revolver. Medium damage, with a decent muzzle velocity and capacity. Modified with a Deadeye scope and stock.

weapons.name: Nagant M1895 Precision
weapons.description: Nagant made, single-action revolver. Medium damage, with a decent muzzle velocity and capacity. Modified with an added stock.

weapons.name: Nagant M1895 Silencer
weapons.description: Nagant made, single-action revolver. Medium damage, with a decent muzzle velocity and capacity. Modified with a silencer. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: New Army
weapons.description: Caldwell made, double-action revolver. High cycle rate and good damage, but balanced by low muzzle velocity. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: New Army Swift
weapons.description: Caldwell made, double-action revolver. High cycle rate and good damage, but balanced by low muzzle velocity. Uses a speed-loader for faster reloading. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Nitro Express
weapons.description: American made, break-action rifle with two barrels. High power, but limited ammunition, and damage drops over range.

weapons.name: Officer
weapons.description: Nagant made, double-action revolver. High fire-rate, muzzle velocity, and capacity at the cost of damage and reload speed. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Officer Brawler
weapons.description: Nagant made, double-action revolver. High fire-rate, muzzle velocity, and capacity at the cost of damage and reload speed. Modified with brass knuckles for melee. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Officer Carbine
weapons.description: Nagant made, double-action revolver. High fire-rate, muzzle velocity, and capacity at the cost of damage and reload speed. Extended stock and barrel.

weapons.name: Officer Carbine Deadeye
weapons.description: Nagant made, double-action revolver. High fire-rate, muzzle velocity, and capacity at the cost of damage and reload speed. Extended stock and barrel, modified with a Deadeye scope.

weapons.name: Pax
weapons.description: Caldwell made, single-action revolver. Reliable, accurate, and sturdy. Once brought peace to the lawless west. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Pax Claw
weapons.description: Caldwell made, single-action revolver. Reliable, accurate, and sturdy. Once brought peace to the lawless west. Modified with a grip-mounted blade. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Pax Trueshot
weapons.description: Caldwell made, single-action revolver. Reliable, accurate, and sturdy. Once brought peace to the lawless west. Modified with an extended barrel. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Railroad Hammer
weapons.description: Two-handed Hammer, swings with weight and power.

weapons.name: Ranger 73
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High fire-rate, large magazine, easy reload, and good handling.

weapons.name: Ranger 73 Aperture
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High fire-rate, large magazine, easy reload, and good handling. Modified with an enhanced toggle-able sight.

weapons.name: Ranger 73 Swift
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High fire-rate, large magazine, easy reload, and good handling. Uses a speed-loader for faster reloading.

weapons.name: Ranger 73 Talon
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. High fire-rate, large magazine, easy reload, and good handling. Modified with a stock-mounted blade.

weapons.name: Rival 78
weapons.description: Caldwell made, break-action shotgun with two barrels. High damage but high pellet spread, two-tapping gives it an edge.

weapons.name: Rival 78 Mace
weapons.description: Caldwell made, break-action shotgun with two barrels. High damage but high pellet spread, two-tapping gives it an edge. Shortened and modified with a rear bludgeon.

weapons.name: Rival 78 Shorty
weapons.description: Caldwell made, break-action shotgun with two barrels. High damage but high pellet spread, two-tapping gives it an edge. Shortened stock and barrel.

weapons.name: Rival 78 Trauma
weapons.description: Caldwell made, break-action shotgun with two barrels. High damage but high pellet spread, two-tapping gives it an edge. Modified with a stock-mounted bludgeon.

weapons.name: Romero 77
weapons.description: American made, break-action shotgun with single barrel. High damage, cost-effective, and tight bullet spread.

weapons.name: Romero 77 Alamo
weapons.description: American made, break-action shotgun with single barrel. High damage, cost-effective, and tight bullet spread. Modified with an added magazine and loader.

weapons.name: Romero 77 Hatchet
weapons.description: American made, break-action shotgun with single barrel. High damage, cost-effective, and tight bullet spread. Shortened and modified with an axe blade.

weapons.name: Romero 77 Shorty
weapons.description: American made, break-action shotgun with single barrel. High damage, cost-effective, and tight bullet spread. Shortened stock and barrel.

weapons.name: Romero 77 Talon
weapons.description: American made, break-action shotgun with single barrel. High damage, cost-effective, and tight bullet spread. Modified with a stock-mounted blade.

weapons.name: Scottfield
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Scottfield Brawler
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Modified with brass knuckles for melee. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Scottfield Precision
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Modified with an added stock.

weapons.name: Scottfield Spitfire
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Shortened barrel and modified trigger for higher rate of fire. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Scottfield Swift
weapons.description: Scottfield made, single-action top-break revolver. Performs well at medium range and can be reloaded quickly when empty. Uses a speed-loader for faster reloading. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Shredder
weapons.description: Experimental weapon that shoots sawblades. Sawblades bounce off hard surfaces and rip into targets. Runes etchings give them the potential to ricochet in the direction of nearby enemies. Must be spun before firing. Only found at the circus.

weapons.name: Slate
weapons.description: Winfield made, pump-action shotgun. High damage and fast cycle rate, with high pellet spread.

weapons.name: Slate Riposte
weapons.description: Winfield made, pump-action shotgun. High damage and fast cycle rate, with high pellet spread. Modified with a long bladed saber.

weapons.name: Sparks
weapons.description: Big-game, single-shot rifle. High power and very effective at range, but cumbersome. Can put down a bison across a prairie.

weapons.name: Sparks Pistol
weapons.description: Single-shot rifle, cut down into a small handgun. Equally powerful up to mid-range, and convenient to handle. Increased recoil. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Sparks Pistol Silencer
weapons.description: Single-shot rifle, cut down into a small handgun. Equally powerful up to mid-range, and convenient to handle. Increased recoil. Modified with a silencer. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Sparks Silencer
weapons.description: Big-game, single-shot rifle. High power and very effective at range, but cumbersome. Can put down a bison across a prairie. Modified with a silencer.

weapons.name: Sparks Sniper
weapons.description: Big-game, single-shot rifle. High power and very effective at range, but cumbersome. Can put down a bison across a prairie. Modified with a long-range scope.

weapons.name: Specter 1882
weapons.description: Specter made, pump-action shotgun. Tight pellet spread and competitive rate of fire, but wasteful reloads.

weapons.name: Specter 1882 Bayonet
weapons.description: Specter made, pump-action shotgun. Tight pellet spread and competitive rate of fire, but wasteful reloads. Modified with a bayonet for melee.

weapons.name: Specter 1882 Shorty
weapons.description: Specter made, pump-action shotgun. Tight pellet spread and competitive rate of fire, but wasteful reloads. Shortened stock and barrel.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866
weapons.description: Springfield made, breech-loading trapdoor rifle. Fires single shots and is effective at long range.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866 Bayonet
weapons.description: Springfield made, breech-loading trapdoor rifle. Fires single shots and is effective at long range. Modified with a bayonet for melee.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866 Bullseye
weapons.description: Springfield made, breech-loading trapdoor rifle. Fires single shots and is effective at long range. Modified with a Deadeye scope, but no stock.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866 Marksman
weapons.description: Springfield made, breech-loading trapdoor rifle. Fires single shots and is effective at long range. Modified with a mid-to-long-range scope.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866 Shorty
weapons.description: Springfield made, breech-loading trapdoor rifle. Fires single shots and is effective at long range. Shortened stock and barrel.

weapons.name: Springfield 1866 Striker
weapons.description: Springfield made, breech-loading trapdoor rifle. Fires single shots and is effective at long range. Shortened and modified with a bayonet.

weapons.name: Terminus
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating shotgun. High capacity and damage, but wasteful reloads.

weapons.name: Terminus Shorty
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating shotgun. High capacity and damage, but wasteful reloads. Shortened stock and barrel.

weapons.name: Uppercut
weapons.description: Caldwell made, single-action revolver. Based on the Conversion, this fires Long Ammo for more damage, but kicks like a mule. Can be dual wielded.

weapons.name: Uppercut Deadeye
weapons.description: Caldwell made, single-action revolver. Based on the Conversion, this fires Long Ammo for more damage, but kicks like a mule. Modified with a Deadeye scope and stock.

weapons.name: Uppercut Precision
weapons.description: Caldwell made, single-action revolver. Based on the Conversion, this fires Long Ammo for more damage, but kicks like a mule. Modified with an added stock.

weapons.name: Vandal 73C
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. A shortened Frontier 73C, this has a reduced capacity and range, but is handier.

weapons.name: Vandal 73C Bullseye
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. A shortened Frontier 73C, this has a reduced capacity and range, but is handier. Modified with a Deadeye scope, but no stock.

weapons.name: Vandal 73C Striker
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. A shortened Frontier 73C, this has a reduced capacity and range, but is handier. Shortened and modified with a bayonet.

weapons.name: Vetterli 71
weapons.description: Swiss made, bolt-action carbine. Powerful at medium distances, and easy to reload. Balances ease of use with damage.

weapons.name: Vetterli 71 Bayonet
weapons.description: Swiss made, bolt-action carbine. Powerful at medium distances, and easy to reload. Balances ease of use with damage. Modified with a bayonet for melee.

weapons.name: Vetterli 71 Cyclone
weapons.description: Swiss made, bolt-action carbine. Powerful at medium distances, and easy to reload. Balances ease of use with damage. Modified with a semi-automatic conversion.

weapons.name: Vetterli 71 Deadeye
weapons.description: Swiss made, bolt-action carbine. Powerful at medium distances, and easy to reload. Balances ease of use with damage. Modified with a mid-range scope.

weapons.name: Vetterli 71 Marksman
weapons.description: Swiss made, bolt-action carbine. Powerful at medium distances, and easy to reload. Balances ease of use with damage. Modified with a mid-to-long-range scope.

weapons.name: Vetterli 71 Silencer
weapons.description: Swiss made, bolt-action carbine. Powerful at medium distances, and easy to reload. Balances ease of use with damage. Modified with a silencer.

weapons.name: Wildland
weapons.description: Winfield made, lever-action repeating rifle. Based on the Centennial , it features a long barrel and Swift reloader.

tools.name: Dynamite Stick
tools.description: A dynamite stick that detonates with a massive blast after four seconds.

tools.name: Waxed Dynamite Stick
tools.description: A dynamite stick with a modified powder fuse that enables detonation under water and in choke bomb clouds.

tools.name: Sticky Bomb
tools.description: Dynamite charge in a sticky frame that can be attached to objects and enemies. Its eight-second fuse doubles the detonation time of a dynamite stick.

tools.name: Dynamite Bundle
tools.description: A bundle of several dynamite sticks. Why only bring one?

tools.name: Frag Bomb
tools.description: Frag bombs send lethal shrapnel over a large area, lacerating nearby enemies. unlike dynamite however, the blast is not strong enough to destroy doors or concertina wire.

tools.name: Big Dynamite Bundle
tools.description: A bundle of many dynamite sticks. When something really needs to be blown up.

tools.name: Knife
tools.description: An all-purpose tool and melee weapon that has saved many lives - and taken just as many.

tools.name: Throwing Knives
tools.description: Silent, but short-ranged projectile weapon. Thrown knives can be retrieved and re-used.

tools.name: Heavy Knife
tools.description: The heavy knife is honed for close quarters combat, its iconic silhouette carves out its home in the American pantheon of armaments.

tools.name: Throwing Axes
tools.description: Silent and deadly short-ranged projectile weapon. Can be retrieved and reused.

tools.name: Fire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container that bursts on impact. Spreads burning liquid over a large area.

tools.name: Liquid Fire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container. Burns on the surface of water. Internal steel balls cause it to burst on impact.

tools.name: Hellfire Bomb
tools.description: Flammable liquid in a glass container that bursts on impact and creates a massive fireball.

tools.name: First Aid Kit
tools.description: A bag of medical supplies that heal 50 health and stop bleeding. Can be used three times.

tools.name: Medical Pack
tools.description: A portable medical kit that heals 100 health. Deployable in active health emergencies.

tools.name: Decoys
tools.description: A bag of scrap metal and glass. When thrown the noise can be effectively used to distract or divert enemies.

tools.name: Alert Trip Mine
tools.description: This portable tripwire mine releases firecrackers and a small flare, alerting others to its location. Comes in a pack of four.

tools.name: Chaos Bomb
tools.description: Set of firecrackers that can be used to temporarily distract nearby enemies. Duration of about 30 seconds.

tools.name: Blank Fire Decoys
tools.description: A decoy that imitates the sound of a gunshot on impact. Useful to distract and confuse enemies.

tools.name: Decoy Fuses
tools.description: Pack of decoy fuses that can be used to breach closed doors and window shutters. It can also imitate the behavior of a lit bomb and can fool your enemies in clearing a space.

tools.name: Fusees
tools.description: Handheld railroad flares used for illuminating dark areas and for signalling. Can ignite flammable materials. Comes in a pack of three.

tools.name: Flare Pistol
tools.description: A small pistol for firing flares into the air, illuminating the area. Can ignite flammable materials.

tools.name: Vitality Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores 75 health.

tools.name: Vitality Shot
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all health.

tools.name: Stamina Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all stamina and stops further depletion for 5 minutes.

tools.name: Stamina Shot
tools.description: A shot which immediately restores all stamina and stops further depletion for 10 minutes.

tools.name: Regeneration Shot (Weak)
tools.description: A shot that continually restores health over a short duration.

tools.name: Regeneration Shot
tools.description: A shot that continuously restores health until fully healed.

tools.name: Poison Bomb
tools.description: On detonation emits a persistant, deadly cloud. Anything caught in or that passes through the cloud will be poisoned.

tools.name: Antidote Shot (Weak)
tools.description: Instantly cures and prevents all poison effects. Physical damage associated with poison attacks still applies.

tools.name: Antidote Shot
tools.description: Instantly cures and prevents all poison effects. Physical damage associated with poison attacks still applies.

tools.name: Hive Bomb
tools.description: Poisonous wasps emerge from this bomb to terrorize anyone unfortunate enough to be in the area. However it has no effect on monsters.

tools.name: Poison Trip Mine
tools.description: This portable tripwire mine releases a cloud of poison when triggered, disorienting enemies. Comes in a pack of two.

tools.name: Dusters
tools.description: A row of metal rings worn on the hand in order to increase the damage caused in hand-to-hand combat.

tools.name: Knuckle Knife
tools.description: The savage knuckle knife is a roughshod specialization for close quarters combat, suited for both bludgeoning and brutal thrusting deathblows.

tools.name: Stalker Beetle
tools.description: Stalker Beetles are bred to hunt and track prey, giving hunters a view from above. As a last resort, they can sacrifice themselves to cause a small explosion hampering anything caught in the radius.

tools.name: Choke Beetle
tools.description: Choke Beetles are bred to hunt and track prey, giving Hunters a view from above. They have evolved to explode into a cloud of suffocating gas, which they themselves are immune to.

tools.name: Fire Beetle
tools.description: Fire Beetles are bred to find and track pey, giving hunters a view from above. Upon death or command, they will burst into flames that burn everything they touch.

tools.name: Ammo Box
tools.description: This small portable Ammo Box partially refills your weapons' extra ammunition, including special ammunition types.

tools.name: Tool Box
tools.description: A portable toolkit that refills some dwindling supplies in a tight spot.

tools.name: Concertina Trip Mine
tools.description: This portable tripwire mine deploys a small concertina bundle perfect for blocking doors and windows. Comes in a pack of two.

tools.name: Concertina Bomb
tools.description: Spring-loaded razorwire coil that unfolds violently when thrown. Shreds and entangles anything that tries to move through.

tools.name: Flash Bomb
tools.description: Light bomb that requires a short priming for its mercury based chemical reaction. The explosion is capable of blinding all in close proximity, even if their eyes are shielded or averted. Needs a short time to be prepared.
